field_values.action_summary: The travelers stumble upon a clearing filled with a massive gathering of wild animals, all appearing terrified.
participants: various forest beasts (tigers, elephants, bears, wolves, foxes)
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots of the animal assembly; Medium shots of diverse animals looking anxious; Reaction shots of the travelers
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Animal placement within the clearing must remain consistent across coverage
Lighting consistency in the forest opening relative to the thick mossy interior
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the massive scale of the forest threat by contrasting the small group of travelers against a vast, unnaturally crowded assembly of terrified wild animals. The visual language must shift from the curiosity of discovery to the visceral tension of an impending threat.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- Lion
- various forest beasts (tigers, elephants, bears, wolves, foxes)

## Required Environments
- ancient_forest_interior (thick mossy perimeter and open clearing center)

## Continuity Constraints
- Animal placement within the clearing must remain consistent across coverage.
- Lighting consistency in the forest opening relative to the thick mossy interior.

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of the clearing.
- BT002: Observation of the assembly.
- BT003: Realization of terror.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
